seo.title: Our Story | Quarterfold Printabilities
seo.description: Powering Global Education Through Print Excellence. Since 2014, we've grown from a single order of 50,000 books to serving 25+ countries with educational materials.

hero.title: Powering Global Education Through Print Excellence
hero.lede: In 2014, Quarterfold Printabilities began with a single order of 50,000 copies for an African publisher. Today, the company prints and delivers educational books for ministries, donor programmes, and publishers across 25+ countries. The scale changed. The promise behind every book did not.
hero.statFoot: Books printed in 2014 that set the direction for everything we've built since.

timeline.title: From One Order to a Global Operation

stops.label: The First Order
stops.desc: Founded in Navi Mumbai as a print management company. A single order of 50,000 books for an African publisher sets the direction.

stops.label: Learning the Continent
stops.desc: Annual production grows to 15 to 18 million books for international markets.

stops.label: Our First Facility
stops.desc: First printing facility set up in Navi Mumbai, bringing production quality under direct control.

stops.label: Scale With Systems
stops.desc: Three advanced facilities spanning 300,000 sq ft, with further investment in all new machinery, including a dedicated fulfilment centre. Over 75 million books delivered to various publishers and Ministry of Education programmes.

stops.label: A Global Operation
stops.desc: 800+ containers shipped across 25 countries in a single year. PrintWeek names Quarterfold Printabilities the Book Education Company of the Year.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Deliver high quality, cost effective educational materials through responsible printing, empowering learners across 25+ countries while exceeding the expectations of every publisher, ministry, and institution served.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To lead the global printing industry with innovative, responsible, and affordable solutions that support education, promote a reading culture, and uphold environmental and social accountability.

values.title: Our Values
values.desc: Quality, reliability, and care in every project, whether one thousand copies or one million.
